rationale: Wave 15 pin-advance ceremony — bridge COMPLETE. Engine content + infrastructure baselined to upstream v0.105.1 per ADR-026 + ADR-027. Bridge timeline: Waves 4 → 14.5 over 2026-05-17 (single-day execution via parallel dispatch + Path D compression after Wave 10.5.β audit identified 0 PORT-pending rows in remaining content buckets). Pin semantics codified ADR-026: content baseline tracks upstream conventions; infrastructure files (UpstreamDriver flex-reflection refactor + surgical SetUpCombat replica) were ahead of pin during bridge. Q1 substrate is parallel-substrate to upstream (immutable records + static methods + ApplyPowerAction queue) — NOT class-hierarchy-inherited; bridge audit revealed v0.105.1 is fundamentally Godot UI + multiplayer refactor with minimal Q1-content impact. Single real Q1-PORT landed: Untouchable UpgradeDelta 2→3 (Wave 10). Plus the slime port (Wave 14) which closes B.1-ε. Q4 canonical registry caught up (Wave 14.5) to phase1-silent.1.
